name: Shanks (OP01-120) (Reprint)
effect_text: [Rush] (This card can attack on the turn in which it is played.)[When Attacking] Your opponent cannot activate a [Blocker] Character that has 2000 or less power during this battle.Disclaimer: This card was reprinted from the original set with changes to the artist credit (note the lack of pen symbol next to the artist name).
